title: Gesuzza the Garibaldian Wife
writer: Alessandro Blasetti, Emilio Cecchi, Gino Mazzucchi
actors: Giuseppe Gulino, Aida Bellia, Gianfranco Giachetti
plot: The story is the harried attempt of a Sicilian partisan, as part of the risorgimento, to reach Garibaldi's headquarters in Northern Italy, and to petition the revered revolutionary to rescue part of his besieged land. Along the wa...
